title: Responsibilities:
content:
Responsibilities:
Manages all primary state: activeApp, llmContent, isLoading, error, interactionHistory.
Manages parameter state: isParametersOpen, currentMaxHistoryLength, isStatefulnessEnabled.
Contains handler functions for all major events: opening an app (handleAppOpen), handling a UI interaction (handleInteraction), closing an app (handleCloseAppView), and managing the parameters panel.
Renders the main Window component.
Conditionally renders the DesktopView, GeneratedContent, or ParametersPanel based on the current application state.
geminiService.ts (The Communicator)
Role: The sole module responsible for interacting with the Google Gemini API.
Responsibilities:
Initializes the GoogleGenAI client with the API key.
Exports streamAppContent, an async generator function.
Constructs the comprehensive prompt by combining the sysPlease review all separate of the pro request and all of the open and unmerged branches; please merge all and compile into one branch; documents, the process to do list and so forth and so onThis is a brilliant line of inquiry. Evolving "Infinite Wiki" into a "multiversal" and "multi-instance" application would transform it from a tool for exploring knowledge into an engine for exploring context and perspective. It becomes a tool not just for learning, but for comparative epistemology.
